ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] (Old Testament) Act out a memorable Bible reading from the term.

[ ] (Old Testament) Retell a memorable Bible reading from the term to a family member or friend.
[ ] (Old Testament) Visit a museum of antiquities to see artifacts from the time of Christ.
[ ] (Old Testament) Learn the names of the books of the Bible. ["The Best Books of the Bible"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=powlzb2Rfdw&ab_channel=JumpStart3) song can help.

[ ] (Old Testament) Take a [virtual tour of Biblical sites](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nl5DNKf0mFw&t=13s&ab_channel=JohnDeLancey) in Israel. How many do you recognize from this year's readings?
[ ] (Old Testament) Visit a [museum](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.bibleplaces.com/us-museums-artifacts-biblical-world/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1748367712641153&usg=AOvVaw0rhMobIU0hSuu13wR5ZW0Z) that houses artifacts from Ancient Israel.
[ ] (Old Testament) Retell a memorable Bible reading from the term to a family member or friend.
